Emotion.title: Every frame tells a story that can never be repeated.
Emotion.description: Real emotions cannot be staged. That is why I strive to capture genuine looks, smiles, and moments that will stay with you for a lifetime.

About.title: About Me
About.description: My name is Damir, and photography is my way of preserving life's most genuine moments. I believe the best photographs are created when people feel natural and comfortable. That is why I always create a relaxed atmosphere during every session, so each photo feels authentic, emotional, and truly alive.

SectionFaq.subtitle: FOR REAL EMOTIONS
SectionFaq.title: Who Is This Photoshoot For?
SectionFaq.description: I help people feel confident in front of the camera, even if they say, “I don't know how to pose.”

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.description: Everything clients usually want to know before their first photoshoot.
Faq.q1: I've never had a professional photoshoot before.
Faq.a1: Don't worry — I'll guide you through every step, from our first conversation to the final edited photos. Everything will be easy, calm, and comfortable.
Faq.a2: Being photogenic isn't something you're born with. It's about trust, lighting, angles, and guidance. I'll help you feel confident in front of the camera.
Faq.q3: I want natural photos without awkward posing.
Faq.a3: No forced smiles or unnatural poses. Only genuine emotions, relaxed moments, and timeless photographs.
Faq.q4: Style and aesthetics are important to me.
Faq.a4: Every detail is carefully considered: location, outfit, lighting, and editing. The result is elegant, natural, and uniquely yours.
Faq.q5: How do I know I'll like the final result?
Faq.a5: Before the session we discuss your ideas, expectations, and style in detail, so you'll know exactly what to expect.

Advantages.title: Benefits of Working With Me
Advantages.description: My goal is to make you feel confident and receive photographs you'll love for years to come.
Advantages.item1Description: Experience allows me to notice every detail—your expression, gesture, light, and mood—creating natural photographs.
Advantages.item2Description: If you wish, your photographs will never be published online.
Advantages.item3Description: No templates. Every photoshoot is built around your personality, wishes, and story.
Advantages.item4Description: You are not just a model. My priority is making you feel relaxed and confident during the session.
Advantages.item5Description: I'll help you choose outfits, makeup, accessories, and the perfect location—even if it's your first photoshoot.
Advantages.item6Description: No hidden fees. Everything is discussed in advance so you know exactly what you'll receive.

Process.title: How the Photoshoot Works
Process.description: From our first conversation to receiving your final photographs, every step is calm, comfortable, and carefully planned.
Process.item1Description: Before the shoot we'll discuss your vision, style, and expectations so everything is perfectly prepared.
Process.item2Description: Together we'll choose outfits, accessories, and the perfect location for your photoshoot.
Process.item3Description: Relax and enjoy the experience. I'll guide you with poses, expressions, and movement throughout the session.
Process.item4Description: You choose your favorite images, and I professionally edit them while preserving their natural beauty.
Process.item5Description: You'll receive your finished high-resolution photos through a private online gallery within the agreed timeframe.
